goals: Discover available unit conversion categories for technical research
Explore specific unit types relevant to military technology specifications
Perform conversions for specific military equipment measurements to verify technical details

user_agent_config.personality: Detail-oriented and skeptical, seeks precise technical information for accurate reporting on military technology.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands military technology concepts and terminology but relies on conversion tools for precise unit calculations. Does not know internal tool names or APIs.

end_condition: The journalist has obtained the necessary unit conversions to verify or present technical specifications accurately in their research.
